name: akagi-ng-root
description: Akagi-NG is a next-generation rewrite inspired by Akagi and MajsoulHelper, focusing on modern architecture and UI.
author: Akagi-NG Contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev -w akagi-frontend" "npm run dev -w akagi-ng-desktop"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -k "tsx scripts/mock_server.ts" "npm run dev -w akagi-frontend" "npm run dev:mock -w akagi-ng-desktop"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run sync-version && npm run build -w akagi-frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build -w akagi-ng-desktop && npm run prepare-release && npm run package -w akagi-ng-desktop
